story: Amina lives with her mother and three younger siblings. She loves reading and dreams of becoming a doctor.

father_passed_cause: Lost in a road accident two years ago
story: Yusuf is the eldest in his family and helps his mother around the house. He is passionate about football and excels in math.
Fatima lives with her stepfather and four siblings. She is shy but very bright and recently won a class spelling bee.
Ahmed is preparing for his matriculation exams. He hopes to study engineering and rebuild his family's home one day.
Sara now lives with her grandmother along with her five siblings. She is the youngest and brings joy to the family.
